data.title: Domino's Pizza And DoorDash Cook Up Delivery Deal, Eye Expansion Across US And Canada

data.title: JPMorgan Hikes Recession Odds As Tariffs Create 'A Dilemma For The Fed'
data.description: US recession risk rises to 40% as Trump's tariffs threaten sentiment, supply chains & central bank flexibility. Sentiment cracks & slowdown could hit world economy hard.
